scenario_brief:
Test Scenario: Horizontal Layout

This scenario demonstrates horizontal connections using east/west directions with the new grid-based layout system.

Layout:
[Storage] ← [Office] → [Servers]
               ↑
          [Reception]

Tests:
- East/West connections
- Single door placement on east/west edges
- Four-direction connection support
- Door alignment for east/west doors

objects.name: Facility Map
objects.text:
Test Scenario: Horizontal Layout

From the office to the north:
- West: Storage Room (contains key)
- East: Server Room (locked)

This tests east/west connections.

objects.name: Office Note
objects.text:
This office connects in three directions:
- South to Reception
- West to Storage
- East to Server Room

Check the storage room for the server access key.

objects.name: Server Room Key
objects.observations: Electronic key card for server room

objects.name: Storage Log
objects.text:
Storage Room - West Wing

This room demonstrates east connection.
The door should be on the east wall of this room.

objects.name: Mission Complete
objects.text:
Success! Horizontal layout test complete.

This scenario demonstrated:
- East/West connections
- Four-direction navigation
- Side door placement and alignment
- Mixed connection types in one room
